layout.clerkKeyMissing: Please set EXPO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in your environment.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.errorIncomplete: Sign-in did not complete. Please try again.
signIn.errorBadCreds: Username or password is incorrect. Please try again.
signIn.errorOAuthIncomplete: OAuth sign-in did not complete. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
signUp.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters (Clerk policy) before sending a code.
signUp.errorUsernameShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
signUp.errorUsernameInvalid: Username may only contain letters, digits, underscore, period, and hyphen.
signUp.errorUsernameRequired: Your Clerk instance requires a username: enter one and tap finish again.
signUp.errorSendFirst: Tap Send to receive a verification code first.
signUp.errorVerifyIncomplete: Verification did not complete. Please try again.
signUp.errorOAuthIncomplete: OAuth sign-in did not complete. Please try again.
signUp.fallbackSignUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please check your email and password.
signUp.fallbackOAuthFailed: OAuth sign-in failed. Please try again.
signUp.fallbackResendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.

tabHints.sea: Catch a bottle and read what someone shared.
tabHints.throw: Write your mood and drop it into the sea.

list.mineEmpty: You have not dropped any bottles yet.

sea.title: Catch a bottle
sea.subtitle: Meet an anonymous story from someone out there.
sea.emptyCatch: Your caught bottle will appear here.

throw.title: Drop a bottle
throw.subtitle: Let the bottle slip into the sea and see where the current takes it.
throw.placeholder: What do you want to share right now?
throw.messageHint: The current decides where it drifts. Your words decide who stops to read it.

repliedToMe.title: Replies to my bottles
repliedToMe.subtitle: Replies others left on bottles you dropped. Masks distinguish different people.
repliedToMe.empty: No replies yet. Drop a bottle into the sea first.
repliedToMe.notRepliedYet: You have not replied to this bottle yet.
repliedToMe.addReply: Add another reply to this bottle

repliedOut.title: People I replied to
repliedOut.subtitle: Each row is someone else’s bottle. “Sea friend” is an anonymous mask.
repliedOut.empty: You have not replied to anyone yet. Try catching a bottle.

toast.writeBeforeDrop: Write something before you drop a bottle.
